untranslatable_reason: Head-and-Shoulders measure rule requires multi-bar pattern recognition: identifying trend start low, HTF high, and HTF low across multiple timeframes, then calculating target price as [(HTF High - Trend Start Low) ÷ 2] + HTF Low. This requires explicit pattern state tracking and multi-timeframe analysis not available in indicator-based conditions. The pattern geometry (shoulder-head-shoulder with neckline) cannot be expressed using available single-bar or simple multi-bar indicators.
